raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX, I received an email from Citibank [ AAdvantage ] ; account ending in XXXX and to XXXX that a charge for {$130.00} was being drawn from my XXXX XXXX XXXX  checking account. When I called Citi Card, they acknowledged seeing the charge but could not explain it. They could not identify the merchant, and I would have to call back in four days. In the meantime, I called XXXX XXXX XXXX and disputed the charge on that end. 
On XX/XX/XXXX, around XXXX am, I again called Citi Card ; the Fraud Dept. The agent could not explain the charge and said it was being investigated. 

Subsequently, I received a letter from Citi Card noting the disputed undertaken by Bank of Oklahoma, and Citi Bank wanted me to go ahead and pay the {$130.00}.

It is alarming that somehow, using the Citi Card system, that someone could initiate a draw on my bank account. I have locked my Citi Card account and deleted all links to all four of my bank accounts.
